SEARCH
Module pgl.app
Package pgl.app.controller

Class MapController

java.lang.Object
pgl.app.controller.MapController
public class MapController extends Object
Controller class responsible for rendering the map visualization layer and managing its UI interactions.

This class handles the graphical canvas layers—rendering hospital nodes, victims' emergency incidents, underlying road infrastructure (color-coded by active traffic load coefficients), Delaunay triangulation meshes, and localized Voronoi cell territories.

It intercepts user interactions such as multi-tiered mouse wheel zooming, continuous click-and-drag panning, interactive node selection with localized graph neighbor highlights, and a drag-and-drop mechanism for nodes that automatically snaps to the nearest road network intersections upon release.

Version:
1.0

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MapController()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clearMap()
    Wipes all nodes and geometric shapes from the parent display container pane.
    void
    clearSelection()
    Resets active selection states and clear highlight collections tracking entities.
    void
    deleteSelectedElement()
    Deletes the active selected element (either a Hospital node or VictimIncident instance) from both the model data layer and map display layout before forcing a viewport refresh.
    void
    initialize()
    Post-initialization constructor hook automatically executed by structural FXML loader components.
    void
    refreshMap()
    Wipes all child objects drawn inside the primary panel layout area and sequentially triggers layered redraw passes for active data components.
    void
    setMapManager(MapManager mapManager)
    Injects the application's global core business engine context resource references.
    void
    setSidebarController(SidebarController sidebarController)
    Hooks complementary UI action layout components tracking sidebar configurations.
    void
    toggleAssignmentsVisibility()
    Inverts the display visibility preference flag of target matching vectors linking incidents to their resolved destinations and updates the viewport.
    void
    toggleTrianglesVisibility()
    Toggles whether Delaunay Triangulation grid lines are drawn on the panel, then refreshes the canvas view.
    void
    toggleVoronoiVisibility()
    Toggles whether Voronoi boundary cell shapes are drawn on the panel, then refreshes the canvas view.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • MapController

      public MapController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Post-initialization constructor hook automatically executed by structural FXML loader components. Hooks layout interaction boundaries to track and trigger zoom or displacement operations.

    • toggleAssignmentsVisibility

      public void toggleAssignmentsVisibility()
      Inverts the display visibility preference flag of target matching vectors linking incidents to their resolved destinations and updates the viewport.

    • setMapManager

      public void setMapManager(MapManager mapManager)
      Injects the application's global core business engine context resource references.
      Parameters:
      mapManager - the foundational model context container instance

    • setSidebarController

      public void setSidebarController(SidebarController sidebarController)
      Hooks complementary UI action layout components tracking sidebar configurations.
      Parameters:
      sidebarController - the target component layout companion instance

    • toggleTrianglesVisibility

      public void toggleTrianglesVisibility()
      Toggles whether Delaunay Triangulation grid lines are drawn on the panel, then refreshes the canvas view.

    • toggleVoronoiVisibility

      public void toggleVoronoiVisibility()
      Toggles whether Voronoi boundary cell shapes are drawn on the panel, then refreshes the canvas view.

    • refreshMap

      public void refreshMap()
      Wipes all child objects drawn inside the primary panel layout area and sequentially triggers layered redraw passes for active data components.

    • deleteSelectedElement

      public void deleteSelectedElement()
      Deletes the active selected element (either a Hospital node or VictimIncident instance) from both the model data layer and map display layout before forcing a viewport refresh.

    • clearSelection

      public void clearSelection()
      Resets active selection states and clear highlight collections tracking entities.

    • clearMap

      public void clearMap()
      Wipes all nodes and geometric shapes from the parent display container pane.
